name: com.meta-game.portail.network
description: Portail network runtime assemblies and native plugins for Steam-backed streaming and remote control.

peerDependencies.com.mirrornetworking.mirror: Mirror runtime assembly required by Portail.Network.Stream
peerDependencies.com.mirror.steamworks.net: FizzySteamworks/FizzyFacepunch Steam transport required by Portail.Network.Stream
